tokens: I'll get it (probably meaning Jim's seatbelt) for you if you want.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (To Joe) And the readings, (heading) 267, (bearing) 088, (distance driven) 2.2, (range) 1.6, 90, 92, 100, 108, and motor temps are still (off-scale) low.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I'm going to see if I can fix my (Hasselblad) camera.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...if our TV camera's still tilted down.
Could you fix it for us, please?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I'll try and get you on the AGC.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And a word on that (TV) camera.
We'll position it before the two of you start the move, and just leave it in whatever position we put it in.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We're not parked very good for you to see, Joe, but, I guess (pause) that's the breaks.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I've got clear flags about 74 percent, and 3.85.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I've got 3.85, flags are clear, and 75 percent.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...do you want some help on that 70-millimeter camera mal(function)-procedures?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Well, I'm holding the trigger depressed and advancing the film, manually, to see if it'll...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I guess, the only thing I could do at this point is change the mag.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Jim, before you do that, try rotating the lens in front.
It may be hung up between detents.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: You mean the locking device on the lens itself?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) Dave, you want to take the time here to let me change the mag?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, why don't you try it, Jim?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...it's the only thing to be done.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think I'll get to work here and...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, you might try cycling that camera without a mag in it, if we've caught you in time here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Long Pause) Yeah, I think the camera's working, Joe.
I'm going to put mag Romeo on.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: That mag worked for a while this morning, didn't it, Jim?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Long Pause) Camera's got so much dust on it, I...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: There's a little bench in the bottom of Scarp Crater, halfway up, about a tenth the diameter of the crater.
And it seems to be all the way around, somewhat irregularly.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, I'm going to get a couple of samples from the rim here; on the surface.
(Pause) Oop; the first one I tried to pick up, just fell apart (which is a good sign of regolith breccia).
Get a couple pieces of it.
Won't be able to look at it for you, but I'll bring it home.
It's a clod; it's just a caked clod.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I put on the other mag; it doesn't work.
I think the shutter's working on the camera, but the drive is not.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: It was working fine last night.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Well, if you want, Dave, I can take your camera and do all the documentation pictures.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: No, I can do it just as well.
Look at that, there's slickensides on that one.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Boy, this is - well, you've probably commented - sure is a unique crater.
Unique that we've seen so far.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Boy, you sink in about 6 inches.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: These look like big pieces of mud, don't they?
(Pause) Okay, let's take a couple of steps out the rim here.
I got one on the rim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You did get the sample already?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let's go down here, you know, a ways out in the ejecta, and see if we can get a couple more.
It's too big for the bag.
Think we can get that in the bag?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You know, this has the appearance of those small ones that we sampled, with the exception (that) there's no concentration of glass in the very center.
Instead every fragment has glass on it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Many of these clods don't have any at all.
Most of them don't have any glass.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Get me a...Oh, you got a bag, okay.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave and Jim, this is Houston.
When you finish this, we suggest you move over closer towards the rim of the rille.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (The sample in) bag number 255 is covered with dirt, but it looks just like a big piece of glass.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You want me to put some fines in with this, Dave?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Jim, throw in a little soil there, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Here, let me have the bag.
(Pause) Don't mess up where the rock was (for the "after" photo), but pick up that little glass ball next to you, too.
See that little glass ball next to where you scooped up?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: To the west of it, you mean?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Dave and Jim, this is Houston with the news report for you.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Be advised your Command Module Pilot, Alfredo, just did a perfect plane change burn.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: He's coming back to look for you.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: ...I can walk as fast as you can drive.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I'll hop on, but I'll just...I don't need the belt.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Under the...Yeah, I put it under...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let me take one crack at it.
Just to...Where did you put it?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Let me take one crack at it here, before we go.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I thought it would be easier to work if I (was wearing it)...(Long Pause)
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Feels like it's trying to drive.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, the shutter's driving, but it's not driving the film.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Want to carry it or chuck it in the...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I think I'll just put it in the seat.
